titleInfo.title: Sichuan Taipeng Shan shiku Fojiao kejing chutan
四川太蓬山石窟佛教刻經初探
A Preliminary Discussion of the Buddhist Stone Sutras at Mount Taipeng in Sichuan

mods.abstract: Some background information on the sutra texts carved on Mount Taipeng, but nothing that was not known to us. The article might still be useful to locate the weathered text fragments more precisely. p. 5–6: They note the long text omission and give a transcription of the mantras at the end of the sutra. p. 7: niche 7: parts of section titles 19 and 20 still legible; sections 18–21 have (partly) remained; inscription destroyed by 嘉定八年（1215年）的《程德降题刻》 p. 7–8: transcription of legible character on the rear wall of niche 8 given; left: part of section 30; right: section title 25 and 32 partly legible; remains of sections 17–32. Two later inscriptions: 南宋嘉定二年（1209年）的《宋德之题刻》和嘉熙戊戌（1238年)年的《汉中聂远题刻》 p. 8: the shallow niches in the rear walls of niche 7 and niche 8 were part of the original design. Niche 8, left-hand side wall (next to an image niche, in which two bodhisattvas [above] and one vajra being [below] have survived: TP_DJI_0183.JPG; more vajra beings on the other side: TP_DJI_0201.JPG): 弟[第]二奉请辟毒金刚，弟[第]三奉请黄随求金刚” 两句，竖排楷书，字径2厘米，保存完好，乃是《梁朝傅大士颂金刚经》中的经文. Quote from T.2732.
